title: MRD Endpoint Language Guardrail Addendum v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma ORP Frontier Roadmap v0
MRD And Relapse Measurement Glossary v0
FDA Draft Guidance On MRD And Complete Response In Multiple Myeloma
PubMed literature anchor: IMWG response and MRD criteria
PubMed literature anchor: MRD and survival meta-analysis
PubMed literature anchor: MRD flow cytometry harmonization

limitations: Not eligibility, expanded-access, monitoring, or screening guidance.
Does not claim that MRD negativity, complete response, stringent complete response, sustained MRD negativity, or deep response means cure.
Does not establish clinical actionability for any endpoint or assay.
Does not rank assays, endpoints, therapies, trials, targets, products, mechanisms, sources, artifacts, or evidence.
Does not use real case data, patient-identifying data, private records, or private correspondence.
Does not authorize endpoint dashboards, scoring, generated claims, patient matching, trial matching, review-packet filling, or recommendation behavior.
Regulatory and endpoint contexts can change after the access date.
